# Filter by management (CIMC) IP address

Use --ip option to select servers by IP address or IP subnet.

Add any extra filtering options following logical AND rule. Use -o|--output for desired output format.

## IP Address

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_servers_ip.address:iserver.output.default
```

## IP Subnet

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_servers_ip.subnet:iserver.output.default
```

Developer output

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_servers_ip.subnet:devel.debug
```
